notes: LINT.LENGTH fires when a variant is outside the brief's target character window for its platform/format. The window is threaded into the gate via the case 'rules.target_chars' block; both cases use the generic Twitter window [1, 280].

cases.name: over-limit
cases.notes: The Recommended variant is 332 chars, over the 280-char window — deterministic, hard.

cases.name: in-window
cases.notes: All three variants sit inside the 280-char window.
